title: Will Noah Dinner Dinner Chicken Winner
company: complete chance, designed a show format in which they win loads and loads of awards. Blending musical comedy, video and audience participation, this fast-paced dynamic sketch show is a wholesome slice-of-life look at what it means to win.

venue.name: Junk Poets at Caravanserai
venue.address: North of St Peters Church, York Place, East Sussex

reviews.reviewer: By The Reviews Hub - Brighton May 9, 2026 No Comments 3 Mins Read
reviews.rating_raw: The Reviews Hub Star Rating 80 % 80% Charmingly Absurd Sketch Comedy
reviews.excerpt: Caravanserai is back at Brighton Fringe after a few years absent, and in spite of the efforts of the lovely staff, there are some issues. In a tight, fenced-off site to the north of St Peter’s Church, liberally peppered by wacky objects and post-apocalyptic buses, people come here to party and to get wasted – it feels more like a festival site than a fringe venue.
